match.userMessage:
Macro overhead flat-lay in modern social-first product photography style showing fingers applying pressure to a lipstick bullet so the texture catches direct flash, shallow depth of field isolating the #D4536D color against neutral #F0E6D3, placed on a crisp white vanity table inside a minimal modern studio with open windows, bright natural window light combined with punchy on-camera flash creating clean directional shadows, high-key airy mood, captured from straight overhead with macro lens and tight framing focused on the tactile surface interaction.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [LOCATION REF]: INT. BONDI STUDIO - Crisp white vanity space with open windows allowing natural sunlight
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
